name: @loop-kit/loop-ai
description: Loop AI doctor skeleton with explicit apply gate.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @loop-kit/loop-contracts build && pnpm --filter @loop-kit/loop-kernel build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @loop-kit/loop-contracts build && pnpm --filter @loop-kit/loop-kernel build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.prepack: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build
